puzzle.title: The Slumber of Ages
puzzle.intro: You are about to embark on a journey through time, encountering a profound mystery of faith and divine power. Imagine a group of individuals who defied the norms of their society, clinging to monotheism in a world of polytheism. Their story is a testament to Allah's ability to protect His righteous servants in the most extraordinary ways. Can you unravel the identity of these remarkable figures?
clues: We were a small group of young men who believed in one God, despite the widespread polytheism of our people.
We fled from a tyrannical ruler who threatened us for our faith, fearing persecution and death.
We sought refuge in a secluded place, hoping for Allah's mercy and protection from our oppressors.
Our Lord caused us to fall into a deep sleep, a miraculous slumber that defied the passage of time.
When we awoke, we believed we had only rested for a day or part of a day, unaware of the vast period that had truly passed.
The Quran mentions that we remained in our state for three hundred years, and exceeded by nine, becoming a sign for mankind.

outcome.label: Outcome
options: They were granted immense wealth and power
They were transformed into apes and swine
They were raised from sleep as a profound sign
They were drowned in a great deluge
outcome.answer: They were raised from sleep as a profound sign

puzzle.verse: And they remained in their cave for three hundred years and exceeded by nine. (Al-Kahf 18:25)
puzzle.arabic: وَلَبِثُوا فِي كَهْفِهِمْ ثَلَاثَ مِائَةٍ سِنِينَ وَازْدَادُوا تِسْعًا
